title: Lease not divided by partial assignment or sublease
doc_html:
§130.  Lease not divided by partial assignment or sublease

A partial assignment or partial sublease does not divide a mineral lease.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §130, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
